title: bromus arundinaceus
intro: Bromus arundinaceus, also known as soft brome or ripgut grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can aid in reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Bromus arundinaceus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it is often used in herbal teas, tinctures, or as a dried herb for medicinal purposes.
